meta.notes: Brazil ANEEL-regulated residential B1 'convencional' (flat) tariff for the Enel SP distributor. Rate APPROXIMATE in BRL/kWh (~2026), excludes taxes (ICMS/PIS/COFINS) and the bandeira tarifária surcharge — verify with ANEEL / the distributor. There is also a Branca (time-of-use) option not curated here. Distributor serves part of São Paulo state (shaded as the SP state polygon — coarse approximation of the actual service area).
